texto: Not all magic is fireworks and fanfare. Sometimes magic is quiet and sneaks up on you. An illusion is what needs all the bells and whistles to make itself appear grander than it really is, which is just a trick that can be explained.
explicacao: Citação de Jeff Guinn sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Not all magic is fireworks and fanfare. Sometimes magic is quiet and sneaks up on you. An illusio…” articula reflexao, magic, fireworks em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
